buildCommand: node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('src/environments/environment.ts', \"export const environment = { apiBaseUrl: '\" + (process.env.API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:8080/api') + \"' };\\n\")" && pnpm build
installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@11.9.0 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
